sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35294" key="e)ndrome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνδρομ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n35294.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run into</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:282" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">282</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπι-</ref> </xr>). </sense> <sense n="II" id="n35294.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run through</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Λιβυκῶν πόρων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.395</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Marc. Arg.).</sense> </entryFree>
